scores.correctness_notes: Fully covers all gold standard points: correct layer YAML, required/optional fields, all three protocol types with correct location formats, auto-injected pebble_service label, and multiple targets. Adds extra details (services set notation, charm Python code) beyond gold standard scope.
scores.hallucination_notes: The services set-like notation (e.g. `[-all, svc1]`, `[-svc2]`) for subtracting/whitelisting services is not present in the gold standard and may be hallucinated Pebble behaviour. The claim 'if services is omitted, no logs are forwarded' is also unverified by the gold standard. The Python charm integration section and loki_push_api library mention are plausible but unverified extras.
